general.title: Getting Started with AI
general.description: New to AI? Start here. These resources cover the fundamentals of machine learning and how to approach learning effectively.

resources.title: AI For Everyone
resources.description: A non-technical introduction to AI, machine learning, and deep learning by Andrew Ng.

resources.title: Machine Learning Crash Course
resources.description: Google's fast-paced, practical introduction to machine learning with TensorFlow APIs.

resources.title: How to Learn AI in 2025
resources.description: A structured roadmap for learning AI and data science from scratch.

general.title: PyTorch & Deep Learning Frameworks
general.description: PyTorch is the de facto framework for most IOAI-style work. Learn tensors, autograd, datasets, and model building.

resources.title: PyTorch Tutorials
resources.description: The official PyTorch tutorials, from 'Learn the Basics' to advanced recipes.

resources.title: Deep Learning with PyTorch: A 60 Minute Blitz
resources.description: A quick crash course through PyTorch tensors, autograd, and neural networks.

resources.title: Dive into Deep Learning (PyTorch)
resources.description: An open-source textbook with runnable code for deep learning using PyTorch.

general.title: How to Approach a Task
general.description: A practical workflow for tackling AI problems: understand the data, build a baseline, iterate, and debug.

resources.title: Kaggle Titanic Tutorial
resources.description: A gentle introduction to the full ML pipeline through a classic competition problem.

resources.title: Machine Learning Project Checklist
resources.description: A checklist-driven approach to scoping, designing, and iterating on ML projects.

resources.title: First Create a Baseline
resources.description: Why a simple baseline should come before any complex model.

general.title: Local Validation & Leaderboards
general.description: How to validate models locally so your leaderboard score does not surprise you.

resources.title: Cross-Validation Guide
resources.description: The official scikit-learn guide to cross-validation strategies and when to use them.

resources.title: Overfitting vs Data Leakage
resources.description: Learn to spot and avoid data leakage with concrete examples.

resources.title: Understanding Leaderboard Shake-up
resources.description: Why local CV and public leaderboard can disagree, and how to handle it.

general.title: Practice Tips & Competitions
general.description: Platforms and habits to apply what you learn through competitions, challenges, and coding notebooks.

resources.title: Kaggle
resources.description: The largest data science community with competitions, datasets, and notebooks.

resources.title: AICC Monthly Contests
resources.description: Community-run IOAI-style practice contests with notebooks and solutions.

resources.title: Codeforces / ML Competitions
resources.description: Algorithmic competitions; useful for the programming side of implementation.

syllabus.title: Foundations of Machine Learning
syllabus.description: Core machine learning concepts that underpin everything else in the IOAI syllabus.

subsections.title: Supervised Learning
subsections.description: Learn to map inputs to outputs using labeled training data.

resources.title: Supervised Learning Notes
resources.description: Stanford CS229 notes on supervised learning theory and algorithms.

subsections.title: Unsupervised Learning
subsections.description: Discover hidden structure in data without labeled targets.

resources.title: Clustering in scikit-learn
resources.description: Comprehensive guide to clustering algorithms and when to use them.

subsections.title: Model Evaluation & Validation
subsections.description: How to measure performance, avoid overfitting, and validate models robustly.

resources.title: Model Evaluation in Machine Learning
resources.description: A practical guide to train/test splits, cross-validation, and metrics.

subsections.title: Feature Engineering Basics
subsections.description: Transform raw data into informative features that improve model performance.

resources.title: Feature Engineering Micro-Course
resources.description: Hands-on feature engineering lessons from Kaggle.

syllabus.title: Deep Learning
syllabus.description: Neural networks and modern architectures: CNNs, RNNs, transformers, and training techniques.

subsections.title: Neural Network Basics
subsections.description: Perceptrons, activation functions, loss functions, and backpropagation.

resources.title: Neural Networks Notes
resources.description: Stanford CS231n lectures and notes on neural network fundamentals.

subsections.title: Convolutional Neural Networks
subsections.description: Architectures for image understanding: convolutions, pooling, and modern CNNs.

resources.title: CNN Explainer
resources.description: An interactive visualization of how convolutional neural networks work.

subsections.title: Sequence Models
subsections.description: RNNs, LSTMs, GRUs, and attention mechanisms for sequential data.

resources.title: CS224n: Natural Language Processing with Deep Learning
resources.description: Stanford NLP course covering RNNs, LSTMs, and transformers in depth.

subsections.title: Transformers
subsections.description: The architecture behind modern NLP, vision, and multimodal models.

resources.title: Attention Is All You Need
resources.description: The original transformer paper. Read it after you understand attention.

subsections.title: Optimization & Regularization
subsections.description: SGD, Adam, learning rate schedules, dropout, batch normalization, and data augmentation.

resources.title: Gradient Descent Series
resources.description: Visual intuitions for gradients, backpropagation, and optimization.

syllabus.title: Natural Language Processing
syllabus.description: Text processing, embeddings, language models, and modern LLM techniques.

subsections.title: Text Preprocessing
subsections.description: Tokenization, normalization, stemming, lemmatization, and handling text data.

resources.title: Natural Language Processing with Python
resources.description: The free NLTK book: a practical introduction to NLP in Python.

subsections.title: Word Embeddings
subsections.description: Word2Vec, GloVe, and contextual embeddings.

resources.title: Word2Vec Tutorial
resources.description: Train and use Word2Vec embeddings with Gensim.

subsections.title: Language Models
subsections.description: From n-gram models to large pre-trained transformers and fine-tuning.

resources.title: Hugging Face LLM Course
resources.description: Learn modern NLP with transformers from tokenization to generation.

subsections.title: Prompting & Inference
subsections.description: How to effectively prompt, evaluate, and deploy large language models.

resources.title: Prompt Engineering Guide
resources.description: A comprehensive guide to prompting techniques and best practices.

syllabus.title: Computer Vision
syllabus.description: Image and video understanding: classification, detection, segmentation, and generation.

subsections.title: Image Classification
subsections.description: Assigning labels to images using CNNs and vision transformers.

resources.title: PyTorch Image Classification Tutorial
resources.description: Train a simple CNN on CIFAR-10 with PyTorch.

subsections.title: Object Detection
subsections.description: Locating and classifying multiple objects in an image.

resources.title: YOLO Documentation
resources.description: Train and deploy YOLO models for object detection.

subsections.title: Image Segmentation
subsections.description: Pixel-level classification for semantic and instance segmentation.

resources.title: Image Segmentation with PyTorch
resources.description: Fine-tune a Mask R-CNN model for instance segmentation.

subsections.title: Vision Transformers
subsections.description: Applying transformer architectures to image tasks.

resources.title: An Image is Worth 16x16 Words
resources.description: The original Vision Transformer (ViT) paper.

syllabus.title: Audio & Signal Processing
syllabus.description: Working with sound: spectrograms, speech recognition, audio classification, and generation.

subsections.title: Audio Basics
subsections.description: Waveforms, sampling, Fourier transforms, and spectrograms.

resources.title: Audio Signal Processing for Machine Learning
resources.description: YouTube playlist covering audio signals, spectrograms, and feature extraction.

subsections.title: Speech Recognition
subsections.description: Converting spoken language into text using acoustic and language models.

resources.title: Whisper: Robust Speech Recognition via Large-Scale Weak Supervision
resources.description: OpenAI's pre-trained speech recognition model and inference code.

subsections.title: Audio Classification
subsections.description: Classifying sounds, music, and speech using CNNs and transformers.

resources.title: Audio Classification with Hugging Face
resources.description: Fine-tune pre-trained audio models for classification tasks.

syllabus.title: Advanced Topics & AI Systems
syllabus.description: Reinforcement learning, generative models, multimodal systems, and responsible AI.

subsections.title: Reinforcement Learning
subsections.description: Training agents to make decisions through rewards and environment interaction.

resources.title: Deep Reinforcement Learning Course
resources.description: Learn RL fundamentals and train agents with Hugging Face.

subsections.title: Generative Models
subsections.description: VAEs, GANs, diffusion models, and autoregressive generation.

resources.title: Diffusion Models Course
resources.description: Understand and use diffusion models for image generation.

subsections.title: Multimodal Models
subsections.description: Models that process and generate text, images, audio, and other modalities together.

resources.title: CLIP: Connecting Text and Images
resources.description: OpenAI's CLIP model and the concept of contrastive language-image pre-training.

subsections.title: Responsible AI
subsections.description: Fairness, interpretability, robustness, and safe deployment of AI systems.

resources.title: Practical Data Ethics
resources.description: A practical course on data ethics, bias, and responsible AI.
